debug_info.goal:
case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

proof:
intro idx1 idx2 hxy
          have hxyl : (y :: x :: l).Perm (x :: y :: l) := List.Perm.swap _ _ _
          exact list_Perm_eraseIdx (l1 := (y :: x :: l)) (l2 := (x :: y :: l))
            (idx1 := idx1.1) (idx2 := idx2.1)
            (hidx1 := idx1.2) (hidx2 := idx2.2) (heq := hxy) (hperm := hxyl)
failed_attempts:
intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          have hlen1 : (y :: x :: l).length = l.length + 2 := by simp [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
          have hlen2 : (x :: y :: l).length = l.length + 2 := by simp [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
          cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
          | zero =>
            cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              simp at hEq
              subst hEq
              simp [List.eraseIdx]
            | succ idx2' =>
              cases idx2' using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx]
              | succ idx2'' =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx] at *
                exact (List.perm_refl _)
          | succ idx1' =>
            cases idx1' using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx]
              | succ idx2' =>
                cases idx2' using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hEq
                  subst hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx]
                | succ idx2'' =>
                  simp at hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx] at *
                  exact (List.perm_refl _)
            | succ idx1'' =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx] at *
                exact (List.perm_refl _)
              | succ idx2' =>
                cases idx2' using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx] at *
                  exact (List.perm_refl _)
                | succ idx2'' =>
                  simp at hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx] at *
                  simpa using (hPerm.eraseIdx (n := idx1'') (m := idx2'') hEq)

cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | hz =>
                  simp at hEq
                | hs idx2 =>
                  simp at hEq
            | hs idx1 =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | hz =>
                simp at hEq
              | hs idx2 =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | hz =>
                  simp at hEq
                | hs idx2 =>
                  simp at hEq

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            fin_cases idx1 <;> fin_cases idx2 <;> simp [List.eraseIdx] at hEq ⊢
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
            intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            exact (ih1 (idx1 := idx1) (idx2 := ⟨idx2.1, by simpa using idx2.2⟩) (by simpa using hEq)).trans
              (ih2 (idx1 := ⟨idx2.1, by simpa using idx2.2⟩) (idx2 := idx2) (by rfl))

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    simpa at hEq
                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp [List.eraseIdx]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        simp at hEq
            | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp [List.eraseIdx]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            simpa at hEq
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            simp at hEq
                | succ idx1 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            simp at hEq
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            simp at hEq
                            simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.swap x y (l.eraseIdx idx1))
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h12 h23 ih12 ih23 =>
            intro idx1 idx3 hEq
            have hin : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
              exact list_perm_in h12 _ (by
                rw [List.mem_iff_get]
                exact ⟨idx1, rfl⟩)
            obtain ⟨i2, hi2⟩ := in_list_idx hin
            have hEq2 : l1[idx1] = l2[i2] := by simpa [hi2]
            have hEq3 : l2[i2] = l3[idx3] := by
              simpa [hEq2] using hEq
            exact (List.Perm.trans (ih12 (idx1 := idx1) (idx2 := i2) hEq2) (ih23 (idx1 := i2) (idx2 := idx3) hEq3))

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    have : y = x := by simpa [List.getElem_cons_zero] using hEq
                    subst this
                    simp
                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx1=0 idx2=1
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] 
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        have : x = l[idx2] := by
                          simpa [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] using hEq
                        subst this
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx1=1 idx2=0
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            -- idx1=1 idx2=1
                            have : x = y := by simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_zero] using hEq
                            subst this
                            simp
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            have : l[idx1] = l[idx2] := by
                              simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ] using hEq
                            subst this
                            simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                | succ idx1 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        have : l[idx1] = x := by
                          simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_zero] using hEq
                        subst this
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            have : l[idx1] = y := by
                              simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_zero] using hEq
                            subst this
                            simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            have : l[idx1] = l[idx2] := by
                              simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ] using hEq
                            subst this
                            simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            -- analyze indices in the two swapped lists
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx2 = 1
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ idx2' =>
                        -- idx2 >= 2, points into l
                        have : (x :: y :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx2')] = l[idx2'] := by
                          simp
                        have hxy : y = l[idx2'] := by
                          simpa [this] using hEq
                        -- impossible: y equals some element of l, but still Perm holds after erasing
                        -- both sides erase y at head/that position -> both become x :: l.eraseIdx idx2'
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, hxy]
            | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    -- idx1 = 1
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            -- idx2 = 1
                            simp at hEq
                        | succ idx2' =>
                            have : (x :: y :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx2')] = l[idx2'] := by
                              simp
                            have hxy : x = l[idx2'] := by
                              simpa [this] using hEq
                            simp [List.eraseIdx, hxy]
                | succ idx1' =>
                    -- idx1 >= 2, points into l
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        have : (y :: x :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx1')] = l[idx1'] := by
                          simp
                        have hxy : l[idx1'] = x := by
                          simpa [this] using hEq
                        simp [List.eraseIdx, hxy]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            have : (y :: x :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx1')] = l[idx1'] := by
                              simp
                            have hxy : l[idx1'] = y := by
                              simpa [this] using hEq
                            simp [List.eraseIdx, hxy]
                        | succ idx2' =>
                            -- both indices in l, so just erase corresponding entries; swap doesn't matter
                            have : (y :: x :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx1')] = l[idx1'] := by
                              simp
                            have : (x :: y :: l)[Fin.succ (Fin.succ idx2')] = l[idx2'] := by
                              simp
                            have hll : l[idx1'] = l[idx2'] := by
                              simpa [this] using hEq
                            subst hll
                            -- both sides erase the same element from l; heads are swapped but persist
                            -- after erasing inside l, both lists are perm by swap
                            simp [List.eraseIdx]

intro idx1 idx2 h
            have hl : (y :: x :: l).Perm (x :: y :: l) := List.Perm.swap _ _ _
            exact List.Perm.eraseIdx_of_getElem_eq hl (by simpa using h)

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            have hx : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] ∈ (y :: x :: l) := by
              simpa [List.mem_iff_get] using ⟨idx1, rfl⟩
            have hy : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] ∈ (x :: y :: l) := by
              simpa [List.mem_iff_get] using ⟨idx2, rfl⟩
            have hmem : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = y ∨ (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = x ∨ (y :: x :: l)[idx1] ∈ l := by
              simpa [List.mem_cons] using hx
            rcases hmem with hcase | hcase
            · -- value is y
              subst hcase
              have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = y := by simpa [hEq]
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                  simp [List.getElem_cons] at this
              | succ idx2' =>
                  cases idx2' using Fin.cases with
                  | zero =>
                      have : (idx1 : Nat) = 0 := by
                        cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero => rfl
                        | succ idx1' =>
                            have : (y :: x :: l)[Fin.succ idx1'] ≠ y := by
                              simp [List.getElem_cons]
                            exact (this (by simpa using rfl)).elim
                      subst this
                      simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons] 
                  | succ idx2'' =>
                      simp [List.getElem_cons] at this
            · rcases hcase with hcase | hcase
              · -- value is x
                subst hcase
                have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = x := by simpa [hEq]
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    have : (idx1 : Nat) = 1 := by
                      cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                      | zero =>
                          simp [List.getElem_cons] at hEq
                      | succ idx1' =>
                          cases idx1' using Fin.cases with
                          | zero => rfl
                          | succ idx1'' =>
                              simp [List.getElem_cons] at hEq
                    subst this
                    simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons]
                | succ idx2' =>
                    simp [List.getElem_cons] at this
              · -- value is in l
                have hinl : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] ∈ l := hcase
                have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] ∈ l := by
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = (y :: x :: l)[idx1] := by simpa [hEq]
                  subst this
                  exact (by
                    simpa [List.getElem_cons] using hinl)
                -- remove same element from both, tails are identical after dropping first two
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    simp [List.getElem_cons] at hinl
                | succ idx1' =>
                    cases idx1' using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp [List.getElem_cons] at hinl
                    | succ idx1'' =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            simp [List.getElem_cons] at this
                        | succ idx2' =>
                            cases idx2' using Fin.cases with
                            | zero =>
                                simp [List.getElem_cons] at this
                            | succ idx2'' =>
                                have hEq' : l[idx1''] = l[idx2''] := by
                                  simpa [List.getElem_cons] using hEq
                                have : (l.eraseIdx idx1'').Perm (l.eraseIdx idx2'') := by
                                  exact list_Perm_eraseIdx (hperm := List.Perm.rfl) (heq := hEq')
                                simpa [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] using this

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            -- eliminate by cases on indices 0/1/≥2
            rcases idx1 with ⟨i1, hi1⟩
            rcases idx2 with ⟨i2, hi2⟩
            cases i1 with
            | zero =>
                cases i2 with
                | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                | succ i2 =>
                    cases i2 with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ i2 =>
                        simp at hi2
            | succ i1 =>
                cases i1 with
                | zero =>
                    cases i2 with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ i2 =>
                        cases i2 with
                        | zero =>
                            simp at hEq
                        | succ i2 =>
                            simp at hi2
                | succ i1 =>
                    -- both indices point into l
                    cases i2 with
                    | zero => simp at hEq
                    | succ i2 =>
                        cases i2 with
                        | zero => simp at hEq
                        | succ i2 =>
                            -- reduce to reflexive perm on l
                            have hEq' : l[i1] = l[i2] := by
                              simpa using hEq
                            have : (l.eraseIdx i1).Perm (l.eraseIdx i2) := by
                              simpa using perm_eraseIdx (hPerm := List.Perm.rfl) (idx1 := i1) (idx2 := i2) hEq'
                            simpa using this
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h12 h23 ih12 ih23 =>
            intro idx1 idx3 hEq
            have hin : l3[idx3] ∈ l1 := by
              apply list_perm_in (hPerm := List.Perm.trans h12 h23)
              exact List.get_mem _ _
            obtain ⟨idx1', hidx1'⟩ := in_list_idx hin
            have hEq' : l1[idx1'] = l3[idx3] := by
              simpa [hidx1'] using rfl
            have h1 : (l1.eraseIdx idx1').Perm (l2.eraseIdx (by
              have : l1[idx1'] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in h12 _ (by simpa using List.get_mem l1 idx1')
              obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := in_list_idx this
              exact j)) := by
              -- use ih12 with some matching index in l2
              have : l1[idx1'] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in h12 _ (by simpa using List.get_mem l1 idx1')
              obtain ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := in_list_idx this
              have hEq12 : l1[idx1'] = l2[idx2] := by simpa [hidx2] using rfl
              exact ih12 (idx1 := idx1') (idx2 := idx2) hEq12
            have h2 : (l2.eraseIdx (by
              have : l1[idx1'] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in h12 _ (by simpa using List.get_mem l1 idx1')
              obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := in_list_idx this
              exact j)).Perm (l3.eraseIdx idx3) := by
              have : l1[idx1'] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in h12 _ (by simpa using List.get_mem l1 idx1')
              obtain ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := in_list_idx this
              have : l2[idx2] ∈ l3 := list_perm_in h23 _ (by simpa using List.get_mem l2 idx2)
              obtain ⟨idx3', hidx3'⟩ := in_list_idx this
              have hEq23 : l2[idx2] = l3[idx3'] := by simpa [hidx3'] using rfl
              -- transport along idx3 = idx3' using hEq and hEq'
              have : idx3' = idx3 := by
                -- both are indices of the same element l3[idx3]
                -- use get-injective on Fin indices is not available; use value equality to rewrite goal only
                -- we just pick idx3 as given by the hypothesis, so use ih23 with idx3
                sorry
              subst this
              exact ih23 (idx1 := idx2) (idx2 := idx3) (by simpa [hEq'] using hEq)
            exact List.Perm.trans h1 h2

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
          | zero =>
            cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              simp at hEq
            | succ idx2 =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
              | succ idx2 =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
          | succ idx1 =>
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
              | succ idx2 =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hEq
                | succ idx2 =>
                  simp at hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
            | succ idx1 =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
              | succ idx2 =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hEq
                  simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, hEq]
                | succ idx2 =>
                  simp at hEq

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            have hxyl : (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx (↑idx1 : Nat) |>.Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx (↑idx2 : Nat)) := by
              cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hEq
                  subst hEq
                  simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (x :: l))
                | succ idx2 =>
                  cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                  | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                    subst hEq
                    simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (y :: l))
                  | succ idx2 =>
                    simp at hEq
                    subst hEq
                    simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.swap y x l)
              | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                  | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                    subst hEq
                    simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (y :: l))
                  | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                      simp at hEq
                      subst hEq
                      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (x :: l))
                    | succ idx2 =>
                      simp at hEq
                      subst hEq
                      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.swap y x l)
                | succ idx1 =>
                  cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                  | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                    subst hEq
                    simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (y :: l))
                  | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                      simp at hEq
                      subst hEq
                      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl (x :: l))
                    | succ idx2 =>
                      have hEq' : l[⟨idx1, by
                        simpa [List.length_cons] using (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ idx1.2))⟩] =
                        l[⟨idx2, by
                        simpa [List.length_cons] using (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ idx2.2))⟩] := by
                          simpa [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] using hEq
                      have : (l.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l.eraseIdx idx2) := by
                        simpa using (perm_eraseIdx (hPerm := List.Perm.refl l) (idx1 := ⟨idx1, by
                          simpa using (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ idx1.2))⟩)
                          (idx2 := ⟨idx2, by
                          simpa using (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ idx2.2))⟩) hEq')
                      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using this
            exact hxyl

intro idx1 idx2 hxy
          have hx : idx1.toNat = 0 ∨ idx1.toNat = 1 ∨ 1 < idx1.toNat := by
            have hlt : idx1.toNat < (y :: x :: l).length := idx1.2
            cases idx1.toNat with
            | zero => exact Or.inl rfl
            | succ n =>
              cases n with
              | zero => exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
              | succ n =>
                exact Or.inr (Or.inr (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_succ _))))
          have hy : idx2.toNat = 0 ∨ idx2.toNat = 1 ∨ 1 < idx2.toNat := by
            have hlt : idx2.toNat < (x :: y :: l).length := idx2.2
            cases idx2.toNat with
            | zero => exact Or.inl rfl
            | succ n =>
              cases n with
              | zero => exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
              | succ n =>
                exact Or.inr (Or.inr (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_succ _))))
          cases hx with
          | inl hx0 =>
            subst hx0
            cases hy with
            | inl hy0 =>
              subst hy0
              simp at hxy
            | inr hy =>
              cases hy with
              | inl hy1 =>
                subst hy1
                simp at hxy
                subst hxy
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.Perm.refl]
              | inr hygt =>
                have : (y :: x :: l)[0] = x := by
                  simpa using hxy
                simp at this
          | inr hx =>
            cases hx with
            | inl hx1 =>
              subst hx1
              cases hy with
              | inl hy0 =>
                subst hy0
                simp at hxy
                subst hxy
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.Perm.refl]
              | inr hy =>
                cases hy with
                | inl hy1 =>
                  subst hy1
                  simp at hxy
                | inr hygt =>
                  have : (y :: x :: l)[1] = y := by
                    simpa using hxy
                  simp at this
            | inr hxgt =>
              cases hy with
              | inl hy0 =>
                subst hy0
                have : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = x := by
                  simpa using hxy
                cases idx1 with
                | mk v hv =>
                  cases v with
                  | zero => cases (Nat.not_lt_of_ge (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hxgt)) hv)
                  | succ v =>
                    cases v with
                    | zero => cases (Nat.lt_irrefl _ hxgt)
                    | succ v =>
                      simp at this
              | inr hy =>
                cases hy with
                | inl hy1 =>
                  subst hy1
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = y := by
                    symm; simpa using hxy
                  cases idx2 with
                  | mk v hv =>
                    cases v with
                    | zero => cases (Nat.lt_irrefl _ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_succ _)) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hygt)))
                    | succ v =>

                      | zero => cases (Nat.lt_irrefl _ hygt)
                      | succ v =>
                        simp at this

                    ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx (Nat.succ (Nat.succ idx2.toNat))) := by
                      simp [List.eraseIdx]
                  simpa [List.eraseIdx] using h1

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>

                | zero =>

                    | zero =>

                        subst hEq

                    subst hEq

                        subst hEq

                        subst hEq

                        subst hEq

                            simp at hEq

                        | succ idx2'' =>
                            simp at hEq
                            subst hEq

          have hx' : x ∈ (x :: y :: l) := by simp
          have hy' : y ∈ (x :: y :: l) := by simp

intro idx1 idx2 hEq

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          have hx : x ∈ (y :: x :: l) := by simp
          have hy : y ∈ (y :: x :: l) := by simp
          have hx' : x ∈ (x :: y :: l) := by simp
          have hy' : y ∈ (x :: y :: l) := by simp
          rcases in_list_idx (α := α) (l := (y :: x :: l)) (x := x) hx with ⟨ix, hix⟩
          rcases in_list_idx (α := α) (l := (y :: x :: l)) (x := y) hy with ⟨iy, hiy⟩
          rcases in_list_idx (α := α) (l := (x :: y :: l)) (x := x) hx' with ⟨jx, hjx⟩
          rcases in_list_idx (α := α) (l := (x :: y :: l)) (x := y) hy' with ⟨jy, hjy⟩
          have hxy : x ≠ y := by
            intro h
            have : (y :: x :: l).length = (x :: y :: l).length := by simp
            subst h
            simpa using hEq

          · have hidx2x : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = x := by simpa [hidx1y] using hEq
            have hidx1 : idx1 = iy := by
              apply Fin.ext
              cases idx1 with
              | mk v hv =>
                cases v with
                | zero => rfl
                | succ v' =>

                  | zero => rfl
                  | succ v'' =>
                    have : (y :: x :: l)[⟨Nat.succ (Nat.succ v''), by simpa using hv⟩] = y := by
                      simpa using hidx1y
                    simp at this
            have hidx2 : idx2 = jx := by
              apply Fin.ext
              cases idx2 with
              | mk v hv =>
                cases v with
                | zero => rfl
                | succ v' =>
                  cases v' with
                  | zero =>
                    have : (x :: y :: l)[⟨1, by simpa using hv⟩] = x := by
                      simpa using hidx2x
                    simp [hxy] at this
                  | succ v'' =>
                    have : (x :: y :: l)[⟨Nat.succ (Nat.succ v''), by simpa using hv⟩] = x := by
                      simpa using hidx2x
                    simp at this
            subst hidx1; subst hidx2
            simp
          · have hidx1x : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = x := by
              cases idx1 with
              | mk v hv =>
                cases v with
                | zero =>
                  simp at hidx1y
                | succ v' =>
                  cases v' with
                  | zero =>
                    simp
                  | succ v'' =>
                    have : (y :: x :: l)[⟨Nat.succ (Nat.succ v''), by simpa using hv⟩] ≠ y := by
                      simpa using hidx1y
                    simp at this

              apply Fin.ext

                | zero =>

                  simp at this
                | succ v' =>
                  cases v' with
                  | zero => rfl
                  | succ v'' =>
                    have : (y :: x :: l)[⟨Nat.succ (Nat.succ v''), by simpa using hv⟩] = x := by
                      simpa using hidx1x
                    simp at this
            have hidx2 : idx2 = jy := by
              apply Fin.ext
              cases idx2 with
              | mk v hv =>
                cases v with
                | zero =>
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[⟨0, by simpa using hv⟩] = y := by simpa using hidx2y
                  simp [hxy] at this
                | succ v' =>
                  cases v' with
                  | zero => rfl
                  | succ v'' =>
                    have : (x :: y :: l)[⟨Nat.succ (Nat.succ v''), by simpa using hv⟩] = y := by
                      simpa using hidx2y
                    simp at this
            subst hidx1; subst hidx2
            simp

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          have hPerm' : (y :: x :: l).Perm (x :: y :: l) := by
            simpa using List.Perm.swap x y l
          exact list_Perm_eraseIdx
            (l1 := y :: x :: l) (l2 := x :: y :: l)
            (idx1 := idx1.1) (idx2 := idx2.1)
            (hidx1 := idx1.2) (hidx2 := idx2.2)
            (heq := by simpa [List.getElem_fin] using hEq)
            (hperm := hPerm')

intro idx1 idx2 h
            have hlen1 : (y :: x :: l).length = l.length + 2 := by simp [List.length]
            have hlen2 : (x :: y :: l).length = l.length + 2 := by simp [List.length]
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>

                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx1 = 0, idx2 = 1
                        subst h

                        simp [List.getElem_cons] at h

                | zero =>
                    -- idx1 = 1

                    | zero =>
                        -- idx2 = 0
                        subst h

                    | succ idx2 =>

                        | zero =>
                            simp [List.getElem_cons] at h
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            simp [List.getElem_cons] at h

                    | zero =>

                | zero =>

                | succ k' =>
                  simp [List.getElem_cons_succ, h1, h2] at hEq
            | succ i' =>
              cases h2 : idx2.1 with
              | zero =>
                simp [List.getElem_cons_succ, h1, h2] at hEq

                | zero =>

                | succ k' =>

          · cases hEq
          · cases hEq
          · simpa using (List.Perm.refl l)
          · simpa using (List.Perm.swap x y l)
          · simpa using (List.Perm.swap x y l)

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          have hEq' : (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] := hEq
          cases h1 : idx1.1 with
          | zero =>
            have hx : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = y := by simpa [h1] using hEq'.symm
            cases h2 : idx2.1 with
            | zero =>
              simpa [h1, h2] using (List.Perm.refl (x :: l))
            | succ k =>
              have : k = 0 := by
                cases k with
                | zero => rfl
                | succ k' =>
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = (x :: y :: l)[⟨k'.succ.succ, by
                    simpa [List.length_cons] using idx2.2⟩] := by rfl
                  simp [h2] at hx
              subst this
              have : False := by
                have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = y := hx
                simp [h2] at this
              contradiction
          | succ k =>
            cases k with
            | zero =>
              have hx : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = x := by simpa [h1] using hEq'.symm
              cases h2 : idx2.1 with
              | zero =>
                have : False := by
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = x := hx
                  simp [h2] at this
                contradiction
              | succ k =>
                have : k = 0 := by
                  cases k with
                  | zero => rfl
                  | succ k' =>
                    have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = (x :: y :: l)[⟨k'.succ.succ, by
                      simpa [List.length_cons] using idx2.2⟩] := by rfl
                    simp [h2] at hx
                subst this
                simpa [h1, h2] using (List.Perm.refl (y :: l))
            | succ k' =>
              have hx : l[⟨k', by
                simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2⟩] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] := by
                simpa [h1] using hEq'
              cases h2 : idx2.1 with
              | zero =>
                have : False := by
                  have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = x := by simp [h2]
                  simpa [this] using hx
                contradiction
              | succ k =>
                cases k with
                | zero =>
                  have : False := by
                    have : (x :: y :: l)[idx2] = y := by simp [h2]
                    simpa [this] using hx
                  contradiction
                | succ k'' =>
                  have hl : l[⟨k', by simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2⟩] =
                      l[⟨k'', by simpa [List.length_cons] using idx2.2⟩] := by
                        simpa [h2] using hx

                    simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2⟩))

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            have hx : (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx (idx1 := idx1) = (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx (idx1 := idx1) := rfl
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                -- idx1 = 0, remove y from left
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    -- idx2 = 0, remove x from right
                    simpa using (List.Perm.refl l)
                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx2 = 1, remove y from right
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        -- idx2 >= 2, hEq implies y = l[idx2], remove corresponding in tails
                        have : y = l[⟨idx2.1, by
                          simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx2.2⟩] := by
                          simpa using hEq
                        -- After erasing 0 on left and (idx2+2) on right, both are perms by cons/swap
                        simpa using (List.Perm.cons x (List.Perm.refl (l.eraseIdx ⟨idx2.1, by
                          simpa [List.length_cons] using (show idx2.1 < l.length from by
                            simpa [List.length_cons] using idx2.2)⟩)))
            | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    -- idx1 = 1, remove x from left
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- idx2 = 0, remove x from right
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            -- idx2 = 1, remove y from right
                            simpa using (List.Perm.refl l)
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            -- idx2 >= 2, reduce to tails with swap
                            have : x = l[⟨idx2.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx2.2⟩] := by
                              simpa using hEq
                            simpa using (List.Perm.cons y (List.Perm.refl (l.eraseIdx ⟨idx2.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons] using (show idx2.1 < l.length from by
                                simpa [List.length_cons] using idx2.2)⟩)))
                | succ idx1 =>
                    -- idx1 >= 2, both indices in tail; reduce to tail equality and use Perm.refl
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        -- impossible: tail element equals x at head, handled by symmetry
                        have : l[⟨idx1.1, by
                          simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx1.2⟩] = x := by
                          simpa using hEq
                        simpa using (List.Perm.refl (l.eraseIdx ⟨idx1.1, by
                          simpa [List.length_cons] using (show idx1.1 < l.length from by
                            simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2)⟩))
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            have : l[⟨idx1.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx1.2⟩] = y := by
                              simpa using hEq
                            simpa using (List.Perm.refl (l.eraseIdx ⟨idx1.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons] using (show idx1.1 < l.length from by
                                simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2)⟩))
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            -- both in l
                            have : l[⟨idx1.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx1.2⟩]
                              =
                              l[⟨idx2.1, by
                                simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using idx2.2⟩] := by
                              simpa using hEq
                            simpa using (List.Perm.refl (l.eraseIdx ⟨idx1.1, by
                              simpa [List.length_cons] using (show idx1.1 < l.length from by
                                simpa [List.length_cons] using idx1.2)⟩))

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    simp at hEq
                | succ idx2 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp [List.eraseIdx]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        simp at hEq
            | succ idx1 =>
                cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                        subst hEq
                        simp [List.eraseIdx]
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            simp at hEq
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            simp at hEq
                | succ idx1 =>
                    cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                    | zero =>
                        simp at hEq
                    | succ idx2 =>
                        cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                        | zero =>
                            simp at hEq
                        | succ idx2 =>
                            simp at hEq
                            have := perm_eraseIdx (hPerm := List.Perm.refl l) (idx1 := idx1) (idx2 := idx2) (by simpa using hEq)
                            simpa [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] using this

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          have h : (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx idx1.toNat = (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx idx1 := by
            cases idx1 <;> rfl
          have h' : (x :: y :: l).eraseIdx idx2.toNat = (x :: y :: l).eraseIdx idx2 := by
            cases idx2 <;> rfl
          simpa [h, h'] using (List.Perm.eraseIdx (List.Perm.swap x y l) idx1 idx2 hEq)

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
          cases h1 : idx1.1 with
          | zero =>
            have hidx1 : idx1 = ⟨0, idx1.2⟩ := by
              cases idx1; simp at h1; subst h1; rfl
            subst hidx1
            cases h2 : idx2.1 with
            | zero =>
              have hidx2 : idx2 = ⟨0, idx2.2⟩ := by
                cases idx2; simp at h2; subst h2; rfl
              subst hidx2
              simp at hEq
            | succ k =>
              have hidx2 : idx2 = ⟨Nat.succ k, idx2.2⟩ := by
                cases idx2; simp at h2; subst h2; rfl
              subst hidx2
              cases k with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
              | succ k' =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
          | succ k =>
            have hidx1 : idx1 = ⟨Nat.succ k, idx1.2⟩ := by
              cases idx1; simp at h1; subst h1; rfl
            subst hidx1
            cases h2 : idx2.1 with
            | zero =>
              have hidx2 : idx2 = ⟨0, idx2.2⟩ := by
                cases idx2; simp at h2; subst h2; rfl
              subst hidx2
              cases k with
              | zero =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
              | succ k' =>
                simp at hEq
                subst hEq
                simp [List.eraseIdx, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
            | succ k2 =>
              have hidx2 : idx2 = ⟨Nat.succ k2, idx2.2⟩ := by
                cases idx2; simp at h2; subst h2; rfl
              subst hidx2
              cases k <;> cases k2 <;> simp at hEq

intro idx1 idx2 hEq
            fin_cases idx1 <;> fin_cases idx2 <;> simp at hEq ⊢ <;> subst hEq <;> simp
        | trans l1 l2 l3 _ _ ih₁ ih₂ =>
            intro idx1 idx3 hEq
            have hmem : l2[idx3] ∈ l1 := by
              apply list_perm_in (l1 := l2) (l2 := l1) (hPerm := by simpa using hPerm_h₁.symm)
              exact List.get_mem l2 idx3
            obtain ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := in_list_idx hmem
            have h12 : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2) := ih₁ (idx1 := idx1) (idx2 := idx2) (by simpa [hidx2] using hEq)
            have h23 : (l2.eraseIdx idx2).Perm (l3.eraseIdx idx3) := ih₂ (idx1 := idx2) (idx2 := idx3) (by simpa [hidx2] using rfl)
            exact h12.trans h23
successful_attempts:
intro idx1 idx2 hxy
          have hxyl : (y :: x :: l).Perm (x :: y :: l) := List.Perm.swap _ _ _
          exact list_Perm_eraseIdx (l1 := (y :: x :: l)) (l2 := (x :: y :: l))
            (idx1 := idx1.1) (idx2 := idx2.1)
            (hidx1 := idx1.2) (hidx2 := idx2.2) (heq := hxy) (hperm := hxyl)
